scenarios.cloze_text: Pediatric nurses use [[BLANK1]] techniques and consider [[BLANK2]] in all interactions.

scenarios.question: Click normal pediatric findings.
scenarios.highlight_text: Child is alert and responsive. Vital signs within age-appropriate range. No distress noted. Parent is engaged.
